name: term-server-agent-events
description: Reports Codex lifecycle activity to the term-server session that launched it.

interface.shortDescription: Show live Codex activity in term-server.
interface.longDescription: Reports coarse lifecycle events to the private term-server session broker. It sends no prompts, command arguments, or tool output and is inactive outside term-server.
defaultPrompt: Show live Codex activity in term-server.
